data.name: Goals_Field_GenreFilter_Hint
data.value: Only books with at least one of these genres count toward progress.

data.name: Goals_Delete_Confirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Goals_ExcludeBooks_Hint
data.value: Excluded books do not count toward this goal's progress.

data.name: Stats_NoRatedInCategory
data.value: No books rated in this category

data.name: Stats_Share_Subtitle
data.value: Choose a time period for your reading card

data.name: GettingStarted_Subtitle
data.value: Track the real first-run flows, replay the intro, and use the hub to cover the rest of the app.

data.name: GettingStarted_Missions_Subtitle
data.value: These missions complete only from real app actions.

data.name: GettingStarted_Atlas_Subtitle
data.value: Covered here without forcing risky or platform-dependent actions.

data.name: Shop_Plants_Description
data.value: Welcome to the Plant Shop! Buy plants to grow as you read. Each plant has unique growth rates and care requirements.

data.name: Shop_Plants_Empty_Body
data.value: Level up to unlock more plants!

data.name: Shop_HowPlantsGrow_Bullet1
data.value: 📖 One reading day = a day with at least 15 minutes of reading

data.name: Shop_HowPlantsGrow_Bullet5
data.value: ✨ Higher level = higher XP boost while reading

data.name: Shop_Decorations_Description
data.value: Decorate your shelves! Cosmetic items to make your bookshelf cosy and unique.

data.name: Shop_Ability_StreakGuardian
data.value: Automatically rescues a breaking reading streak once every 14 days.

data.name: Shop_Ability_EternalPhoenix
data.value: Revives itself and shields all other plants from dying.

data.name: Shop_Ability_StoryHeart
data.value: +25% XP, +25% level-up coins, +400 coins on sessions of 30 minutes or more, doubled plant growth, +2.5% of next-level XP on the first session of each day.

data.name: Reading_NoSession_Body
data.value: Start reading a book to begin a session.

data.name: Reading_BookNotFound_Body
data.value: The book for this reading session could not be loaded.

data.name: Reading_FocusHint
data.value: Focus on reading — this session is being tracked automatically

data.name: BookDetail_NotFound_Body
data.value: This book could not be loaded.

data.name: BookDetail_NotesHint
data.value: Write your thoughts, quotes, or analysis here. Auto-saved.

data.name: BookEdit_TropesHint
data.value: Select matching tropes based on your selected genres.

data.name: BookEdit_ShelvesHint
data.value: Assign this book to manual shelves. Auto-sort shelves are populated automatically.

data.name: BookEdit_NoManualShelves
data.value: No manual shelves available. Create them on the Bookshelf page.

data.name: BookEdit_SpineDisplayHint
data.value: Choose how the book spine should be displayed in the bookshelf

data.name: BookEdit_CoverModeRequires
data.value: Cover mode requires a cover image

data.name: Bookshelf_AutoSort_Hint
data.value: Auto-sort shelves automatically include books matching the status.

data.name: Bookshelf_NoPlantsAvailable
data.value: No plants available. Visit the shop?

data.name: Bookshelf_NoDecorationsAvailable
data.value: No decorations available. Visit the shop?

data.name: Bookshelf_DeleteShelf_Body
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this shelf? All items will be moved to the main shelf.

data.name: Wishlist_Empty_Hint
data.value: Tap + to add books you want to read

data.name: Wishlist_NotesPlaceholder
data.value: Why do you want to read this?

data.name: Settings_PlusPremium_Subtitle
data.value: Manage your subscription and unlock more of BookHeart

data.name: Settings_Notifications_EnableDescription
data.value: Allow BookHeart to send you notifications

data.name: Settings_Notifications_DailyReminderDescription
data.value: Get a daily nudge to read

data.name: Settings_Shelf_BarDescription
data.value: The bottom bar of each shelf

data.name: Settings_Data_Subtitle
data.value: Save, restore, or erase your library

data.name: Settings_Danger_Description
data.value: Delete all your books, reading sessions, goals, plants, and reset your progress. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Settings_Help_Subtitle
data.value: Learn the app, replay the intro, or support development

data.name: Settings_Help_HideCtaDescription
data.value: Hide the Bookshelf prompt when checklist steps are still open

data.name: Settings_Privacy_Subtitle
data.value: Control which anonymous data BookHeart collects

data.name: Settings_Privacy_UsageStatsDescription
data.value: Helps us understand which features are being used. No book titles, authors or personal notes are transmitted.

data.name: Settings_Privacy_CrashReportsDescription
data.value: Sends an anonymous error report when the app crashes so the issue can be fixed. No personal data is included.

data.name: Settings_Privacy_DisableNote
data.value: When disabled, cached events and the anonymous device ID are reset. Data that was already transmitted cannot be recalled.

data.name: Settings_MoreInfo_DiagnosticsHint
data.value: If data is missing, screenshot this log and send it to support.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Overview_Body
data.value: BookHeart is an offline-first book tracking app. Your data is stored locally on your device and is never transmitted to our servers. We do not collect, store, or share any personal information.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Storage_Body
data.value: All your books, reading sessions, goals, plants, and settings are stored in a local database (SQLite) on your device. This data never leaves your device unless you explicitly use the Backup & Restore feature.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Camera_Body
data.value: BookHeart requests camera access solely for scanning book barcodes (ISBN). No photos or videos are captured, stored, or transmitted. Camera access is optional and can be denied without affecting other app features.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Network_Body
data.value: When you look up a book by ISBN, BookHeart sends the ISBN number to the Google Books API to retrieve book metadata (title, author, cover image). No personal data or device identifiers are included in these requests. The app functions fully offline without this feature.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_ThirdParty_Body
data.value: BookHeart uses three third-party services: the Google Books API for optional ISBN lookup, Firebase Analytics for anonymous usage statistics (Android only, enabled by default, opt-out under Settings → Privacy), and Firebase Crashlytics for anonymous crash reports (Android only, enabled by default, opt-out under Settings → Privacy). Firebase never receives book titles, authors, ISBNs, quotes, annotations, or personal notes — only coarse bucketed counts. The Android Advertising ID and Android ID are explicitly disabled.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Deletion_Body
data.value: You can delete all your data at any time using the "Delete All Data" option in Settings. Uninstalling the app also removes all stored data from your device.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Children_Body
data.value: BookHeart does not knowingly collect any information from children. The app does not require account creation or any personal information to function.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Changes_Body
data.value: Any changes to this privacy policy will be reflected in app updates. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates the most recent revision.

data.name: Settings_PrivacyPolicy_Contact_Body
data.value: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please open an issue on our GitHub repository or contact us via the Play Store listing.

data.name: Settings_Delete_Success_Body
data.value: All your data has been deleted. Starting fresh!

data.name: Settings_Language_Description
data.value: BookHeart will restart after changing the language

data.name: Settings_Restart_BackupBody
data.value: BookHeart is restarting to finish loading your data…

data.name: Settings_Restart_LanguageBody
data.value: BookHeart is restarting to apply the new language…
